Record exact blockers per target.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T15:17:22.673737Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T15:17:22.67724Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.31","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-15T15:17:22.677239Z"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Using account 210337117346 and the us-west-2c EBS builder, build Puck for T-Echo, RAK4631, T1000-E, T-Deck, supported Heltec ESP32-S3, Nucleo WL55JC, native_sim, and native_sim/native/64; build Gateway for Nucleo and native_sim; build lora_ping for T-Echo, RAK4631, and Nucleo Renode overlays; build declared Rust ESP32/nRF/STM32WL bridges; record exact selectors, source/patch hashes, RAM/flash deltas, and logs; reject unsupported aliases, ignored packaging failures, and STM32WL memory overflow; verify clean-worktree provenance."}

old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.31","title":"Build supported board matrix","description":"Build the supported Zephyr board/application variants using the EBS source cache: T-Echo, T1000-E, R1 Neo, T-Deck, Heltec ESP32-S3, and RAK4631. Record exact blockers per target.","acceptance_criteria":"Using account 210337117346 and the us-west-2c EBS builder, build Puck for T-Echo, RAK4631, T1000-E, T-Deck, supported Heltec ESP32-S3, Nucleo WL55JC, native_sim, and native_sim/native/64; build Gateway for Nucleo and native_sim; build lora_ping for T-Echo, RAK4631, and Nucleo Renode overlays; build declared Rust ESP32/nRF/STM32WL bridges; record exact selectors, source/patch hashes, RAM/flash deltas, and logs; reject unsupported aliases, ignored packaging failures, and STM32WL memory overflow; verify clean-worktree provenance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T15:17:22.673737Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:10:56.411439Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.31","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-15T15:17:22.677239Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.31","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.56","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:28:30.169285Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"All five children pass every declared build/package row with exact selectors and no silent matrix reduction. nRF52840 covers T-Echo, RAK4631, T1000-E, R1 Neo where supported, and lora_ping Renode overlays; STM32WL covers Nucleo WL55JC Puck/Gateway/lora_ping and memory limits; ESP32 covers T-Deck and supported Heltec ESP32-S3 variants; native_sim/apps covers Puck/Gateway native_sim and native_sim/native/64; Rust bridge child covers declared ESP32/nRF52840/STM32WL bridge targets without duplicating .35.6 link gates. Source/patch/tool/command/log/artifact hashes and RAM/flash deltas are retained; every failure is fatal. Parent closes only after all children and mandatory EBS unmount/detach/wait-available plus ownership-checked cleanup succeed.","description":"Scope: build and package the recovered supported Zephyr board/application matrix, split into children for nRF52840, STM32WL, ESP32, native_sim/apps, and Rust bridges. After .56, run with AWS_PROFILE=personal and AWS_REGION=us-west-2 in account 210337117346 on an owned Project=LICHEN builder in us-west-2c using only approved EBS vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Each child starts from a fresh clean worktree at the recorded base, applies only its identified recovery commit/binary patch, and records source, patch, manifest, board selector, toolchain, command, output, packaging, size, log, and hash provenance. This matrix checks supported production/app builds; it does not duplicate .35.6 link_crypto, puck/L2, kiss_transport, or link-migration bridge gates.","design":"Every row records exact board/SoC/app selector, pristine/full command and environment, base and applied commit IDs, patch SHA-256, west manifest, Zephyr/SDK/compiler/CMake/Ninja/Rust versions as applicable, UTC start/end, exit status, warning/error output, ELF/BIN/HEX/package SHA-256, and RAM/flash report/delta. Unsupported aliases, fallback boards, omitted variants, ignored packaging/signing failures, stale outputs, STM32WL overflow, warnings promoted by declared gates, nonzero exits, or dirty-worktree verification fail closed. Evidence is copied and hashed before cleanup; then sync, verify no mount users, unmount /mnt/lichen-zephyr, ownership-check exact RunId/instance/volume, detach vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, wait for volume-available, and terminate only the owned tagged instance.","notes":"Preserved original board intent: T-Echo, T1000-E, R1 Neo, T-Deck, Heltec ESP32-S3, RAK4631, Nucleo WL55JC, native_sim applications, lora_ping overlays, and declared Rust bridges. Record exact blockers per target rather than treating an unsupported alias or memory overflow as a pass."}
